name: _mm256_add_epi32
description: Add packed 32-bit integers in a and b.

name: _mm256_add_ps
description: Performs a SIMD addition of eight packed single-precision floating-point elements in m1 and m2.

name: _mm256_add_pd
description: Performs a SIMD addition of four packed double-precision floating-point elements in m1 and m2.

name: _mm_add_ps
description: Add packed single-precision floating-point values in a and b.

name: _mm512_maskz_expandloadu_epi32
description: Load packed 32-bit integers from memory into selected elements using zero-masking.
notes: This intrinsic may expand to a sequence on older targets.
